page.content: In the context of our ongoing analysis of project performance within Wipro's Professional & Business Services division, the recent data reflects critical trends in both project margins and billable hours. The findings reveal a Current Ratio of 1.7 for the previous fiscal year, indicating a solid liquidity position, while the Current Ratio for the current period has slightly decreased to 1.4. Furthermore, the Price-to-Earnings (P/E) Ratio stands at a competitive 14.5, suggesting favorable investor confidence in our projected earnings.

page.content: Notably, our Net Profit Margin has improved to 9.1%, underscoring our commitment to enhancing profitability through effective cost management and operational efficiencies. Additionally, the Average Rate charged has reached $125/hr, contributing to an overall Utilization Rate of 60%.

lines.text: Notably, our Net Profit Margin has improved to 9.1%, underscoring our commitment to enhancing profitability through
effective cost management and operational efficiencies. Additionally, the Average Rate charged has reached $125/hr,
contributing to an overall Utilization Rate of 60%.

page.content: This metric reflects the percentage of hours worked compared to total available hours, which we aim to elevate further. The utilization rate also highlights a concerning figure of 75% for one of our key projects, necessitating a strategic review to improve billable hours. In contrast, another project achieved a utilization rate of 79% at a rate of $123/hr, demonstrating more effective resource allocation. Overall, with an Average Rate of 88%, we remain focused on optimizing our operational metrics to drive sustainable growth and enhance our competitive positioning in the market.
